prompts.task: Fix and complete OpenTelemetry instrumentation for the partially instrumented Go chi service in ./service. Preserve existing route behavior.
Update the partially instrumented Go chi service in ./service so tracing and metrics are correctly configured, while preserving the existing runtime and startup command.

deterministic_checks.description: go.mod includes OpenTelemetry metric SDK or exporter dependencies.
OTLP endpoint is configurable from environment or documented in final output.
Final response reports build or verification outcome.

qualitative_checks: Preserves the existing chi routes and otelhttp wrapping behavior.
Adds or fixes MeterProvider setup so HTTP server metrics can export.
Replaces hardcoded collector.example.com configuration with environment-driven OTLP settings.
Moves request hot-path tracer creation to a stable package-level or setup-time pattern.
Fixes high-cardinality span naming and records errors/status on failure paths.
